day4_morning_start.name: Me
day4_morning_start.text: *Day 4 morning. My eyes opened before the alarm. 5:38 AM.*

day4_morning_start_2.name: Me
day4_morning_start_2.text: *Last night's nightmare comes back to me. Seolhwa's transparent hand. 'Five days.' Tears.*

day4_morning_start_3.name: Me
day4_morning_start_3.text: *...If it wasn't a dream but a warning. Two days remain.*

day4_morning_start_4.name: Me
day4_morning_start_4.text: *I look in the mirror. My face is pale. Dark circles under my eyes are deep. I look like a different person from three days ago.*

day4_morning_start_5.name: Me
day4_morning_start_5.text: *...I have to go to school. Or do I? What happens if I don't go? Will Ms. Eunsu come looking for me? Will Sea contact me?*

day4_morning_start_6.name: Me
day4_morning_start_6.text: *...The safety app. Location tracking. They might already know where I am.*

day4_morning_start_7.name: Me
day4_morning_start_7.text: *I have to go. Not going would only make them more suspicious. I also need to find Yuna.*

day4_morning_start_8.name: Me
day4_morning_start_8.text: *My hands tremble as I put on my uniform. ...I clenched my fist to stop the shaking.*

day4_morning_commute.name: Me
day4_morning_commute.text: *The walk to school. My steps are heavy.*

day4_morning_commute_2.name: Me
day4_morning_commute_2.text: *Until yesterday this was a beautiful cherry-blossom commute. Today... it feels like a path to a grave.*

day4_morning_commute_3.name: Me
day4_morning_commute_3.text: *That's an exaggeration. Right? ...I hope it's an exaggeration.*

day4_morning_gate.name: Me
day4_morning_gate.text: *I arrived at the school gate. ...The atmosphere is different from yesterday.*

day4_morning_gate_2.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_2.text: *Students pass through the gate in small groups. A normal morning scene... it should be.*

day4_morning_gate_3.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_3.text: *The students' expressions... are all the same.*

day4_morning_gate_4.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_4.text: *Everyone is smiling. The exact same smile. Corners of the mouth lifted at the same angle. As if rehearsed.*

day4_morning_gate_5.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_5.text: *...Was it always like this? Was it like this on day 1? My memory... isn't certain.*

day4_morning_gate_6.name: Me
day4_morning_gate_6.text: *Ms. Eunsu is standing at the front gate. ...Why is the teacher at the gate? She was usually in the faculty office.*

day4_morning_eunsu_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_eunsu_2.text: "I'll walk you there myself today. Let's go together."

day4_morning_eunsu_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_eunsu_3.text: "May I hold your hand? I'll get you to school safely."

day4_morning_eunsu_4.name: Me
day4_morning_eunsu_4.text: *The teacher holds out her hand. She's smiling. A warm smile. ...Was this smile always this scary?*

day4_morning_eunsu_comply.name: Me
day4_morning_eunsu_comply.text: *I took the teacher's hand. Warm, but... strong. It's hard to pull away.*

day4_morning_eunsu_comply_3.name: Me
day4_morning_eunsu_comply_3.text: *The teacher takes my hand and leads me to the classroom. ...Whether this is an escort or a march, I can't tell.*

day4_morning_eunsu_refuse.name: Me
day4_morning_eunsu_refuse.text: "It's fine. I can go by myself."

day4_morning_eunsu_refuse_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_eunsu_refuse_3.text: "But {name}, it's best not to wander alone in this school."

day4_morning_classroom_3.name: Me
day4_morning_classroom_3.text: *Yuna's seat. Empty. No bag. Not even a trace.*

day4_morning_classroom_4.name: Me
day4_morning_classroom_4.text: *...Nobody notices. The student at the adjacent seat stares blankly at Yuna's empty seat and then looks away.*

day4_morning_sea.name: Han Sea
day4_morning_sea.text: "Yuna? ...They say she transferred. Back to her original school."

day4_morning_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day4_morning_sea_3.text: "Last night, I think? It was sudden, even I was surprised."

day4_morning_sea_4.name: Me
day4_morning_sea_4.text: *Suddenly transferred? Last night? Yuna never said anything like that... yesterday Yuna gave me a memory card. Said that 'transfer students disappeared.' Someone who said that suddenly transferred?*

day4_morning_sea_5.name: Han Sea
day4_morning_sea_5.text: "Don't worry about it. You have me, {name}."

day4_morning_sea_6.name: Me
day4_morning_sea_6.text: *Sea smiles. ...That smile feels particularly cold today.*

day4_morning_class_start.name: Me
day4_morning_class_start.text: *First period. Ms. Eunsu stands at the podium.*

day4_morning_class_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_class_2.text: "Today let's talk about a special topic. 'Belonging.'"

day4_morning_class_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_class_3.text: "You 'belong' to this school. You are part of this school."

day4_morning_class_4.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_class_4.text: "Belonging is... safety. Being here means being protected."

day4_morning_class_5.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_morning_class_5.text: "But trying to leave this school... is like throwing away a part of yourself."

day4_morning_class_7.name: Me
day4_morning_class_7.text: *...The teacher is only looking at me. Every pair of eyes in the classroom is pointed my way. 30 pairs of eyes. All smiling. All with the same smile.*

day4_morning_class_9.name: Me
day4_morning_class_9.text: *That one word barely made it out of my mouth. The teacher smiles with satisfaction. ...I want to get out of this classroom. Right now.*
